description: Dev ego uses legacy twitter_dev_* files; others live under data/processed/egos/<ego_id>/

egos.label: medium_circles
egos.notes: Slightly larger than dev; non-empty SNAP circles.

egos.label: moderate_large_circles
egos.notes: More nodes/edges than dev; multiple circles.

egos.label: detected_communities
egos.notes: Empty .circles in SNAP; communities from greedy modularity.

egos.label: large_circles
egos.notes: Larger ego (~239 nodes); circles non-empty; for main conclusions.
